name: MPS Infotecnics Limited
summary: MPS Infotecnics Limited provides information technology (IT) solutions to organizations worldwide. The company operates through three segments: Telecommunication, IT Solutions & Products, and IT Enabled Services. It provides BusinesSoft, a solution for service, pharmaceutical, manufacturing, chemical, and trading companies; BusinessPro, which automates the functions of an organization and deploys enterprise wide applications; and domain name registration and Web hosting services in cloud infrastructure. The company also offers system integration and networking solutions, enterprise software, value added services and IT enabled services, e-business applications, and election cards printing services. In addition, it supplies servers, desktop and notebook computers, peripherals, and power correction equipment; data communication equipment, such as routers, switches, and remote access servers; structured cabling systems; and wireless connectivity products, as well as provides maintenance support services. Further, the company offers networking services, including network planning and designing, hardware and software procurement, network installation, user personnel training, and long-term support, as well as biometrics services. Additionally, it exports mobile phones to Taiwan and Hong Kong. MPS Infotecnics Limited serves customers operating in the government, telecom, manufacturing, MNC and overseas, financial, IT, transport and tourism, and other sectors. The company was formerly known as Visesh Infotecnics Limited and changed its name to MPS Infotecnics Limited in January 2016. MPS Infotecnics Limited was founded in 1989 and is based in New Delhi, India.
